CREATE TABLE settings (name String, value String);

SELECT (SELECT getSettingOrDefault('custom_setting_1', 'val1') FROM settings WHERE name = 'custom_setting_1') AS result1, (SELECT getSettingOrDefault('custom_setting_2', 'val2') FROM settings WHERE name = 'custom_setting_2') AS result2;
SELECT getSettingOrDefault('custom_setting_1', 'default') AS setting_value UNION ALL SELECT getSettingOrDefault('custom_setting_3', 'default') AS setting_value;
CREATE TABLE settings_override (name String, value Int32 DEFAULT 100);
SELECT getSettingOrDefault((SELECT name FROM settings WHERE name = 'custom_setting_1'), 'fallback_value');
